value.description: Returns ingest contract metadata (same values as GET /contract/version).
value.name: queries:getContractVersion

value.description: Returns this list of callable public query names and argument shapes.
value.name: queries:listPublicQueries

value.description: Dashboard query: tracker/time filtered raw events with heartbeat-collapse support and high-volume map windows.
value.name: queries:getDashboardEvents

value.description: Fetches a single raw event by eventId (or null if missing).
value.name: queries:getEventById

value.description: Returns latest liveness rows. With trackerId, returns at most one row in an array.
value.name: queries:listTrackerLiveness

value.description: Returns newest raw events ordered by ingestTsMs descending.
value.name: queries:listRecentRawEvents

value.description: Returns tracker-specific raw events ordered by trackerTsMs descending.
value.name: queries:getTrackerEventHistory

value.description: Returns raw events for one eventType ordered by trackerTsMs descending.
value.name: queries:getEventsByType

value.description: Returns BLE/RFID events for one beacon ordered by trackerTsMs descending.
value.name: queries:getBeaconHistory

value.description: Returns resolver + live heartbeat-aware owner state for one beacon.
value.name: beaconOwnership:getCurrentOwner

value.description: Returns near-live parcel location, owner tracker/state, freshness, and tracker connectivity metadata.
value.name: beaconOwnership:getCurrentParcelLocation

value.description: Returns resolved/ambiguous ownership segments for one beacon.
value.name: beaconOwnership:getAssignmentTimeline

value.description: Returns location path points based on resolved ownership segments.
value.name: beaconOwnership:getResolvedPath

value.description: Returns parcel route sessions (start/end/reasons/backfill count).
value.name: beaconOwnership:getRouteSessions

value.description: Returns route-session path points with provenance (resolved_scan vs inferred_gap_backfill).
value.name: beaconOwnership:getRoutePath

value.description: Lists active conflict beacons ordered by repair priority.
value.name: beaconOwnership:listActiveConflicts

value.description: Returns tracking-number assignment rows for a beacon.
value.name: beaconTracking:getByBeaconId

value.description: Returns assignment rows for a tracking number.
value.name: beaconTracking:getByTrackingNumber

value.description: Deprecated: returns friendly beacon name row for a beaconId.
value.name: beaconNames:getByBeaconId

value.description: Deprecated: returns beacon rows using the same friendly name.
value.name: beaconNames:getByBeaconName
